name: gecko-trade-agent
description: Self-hostable trading agent with a transparent 5-voice gate including a pre-execution devil's advocate. Paper-default; honest about edge — 10 published nulls, breakout is -EV in chop. For crypto operators evaluating someone else's signals, not building new ones. Plugs into OKX onchainOS today; SendAI Solana Agent Kit landing in Phase B.
